name: Monsarrat Shave Ice
tagline: Real fruit compotes layered into silky ice — the gourmet shave ice that Diamond Head locals swear by.
mustOrder: Any flavor with ice cream and mochi balls — the full experience
Coconut cream or matcha — the house signatures
Mango or mixed berry — pure real fruit, no artificial syrup
parking: Street parking on Monsarrat Ave — limited but usually findable on weekdays
talkStory: This little window next to Pioneer Saloon uses real organic fruit jams and compotes instead of artificial syrups — you can taste the difference immediately. Each cup is carefully layered by hand. Open daily 11am–5:30pm, closed on rainy days (they're serious about that). Add the Meadow Gold ice cream and shiratama mochi balls for the full experience. One of the best kept secrets on Monsarrat Ave's food row.
